example: I could not fully comprehend his explanation.

meaning: n.特征；特点；性格特征；特性

meaning: v.造成；引起；提出；摆姿势；n.姿势

example: Her devotion to her family is admirable.
meaning: n.奉献；忠诚；热爱；专心

example: The school suspended classes because of the storm.

example: Assuming the weather is fine, we will go hiking.

meaning: v.源于；来自；得到；推导出
